summary: Excellent audience recording that showcases the famed Wall of Sound, capturing an amazingly jam‑filled performance.
review: Fans rave about this concert’s high energy and tight jamming, calling it an amazing show and noting its place as the last pre‑Europe gig. The audience tape (and available soundboard sources) are praised for faithfully reproducing the Wall of Sound, delivering clear and vibrant audio that lets listeners soak in the full band experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are strongly positive (4–5 stars) and highlight both stellar performance and high‑quality audio, leading to a weighted rating near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording praised for capturing the Wall of Sound; soundboard sources also noted as fantastic, suggesting very clear and vibrant audio overall.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans emphasize the jam‑heavy nature and high energy of the show, noting it was the final performance before the band moved to Europe.
